item.title: 压缩作为认知失败：Agentic LLM 工具如何从终止的进程中生成确认的结果
item.summary: arXiv:2607.13071v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Agentic LLM coding tools compress long session histories into compaction summaries that subsequent sessions inherit as ground truth. This paper documents a failure mode in Claude Code where partial standard output from timed-out commands (exit code 143) is recorded in c
